# Partnerships

## Acme Corp + CFO Centre Canada
Acme Corporation engages CFO Centre for fractional CFO services. B. Anderson is the primary liaison from CFO Centre. This partnership began in 2023.

## Acme Corp + Meridian Financial Group
Acme and Meridian Financial collaborate on the Digital Transformation project. Maria Gonzalez leads the Meridian side. Gonzalez and Liu are exploring a broader strategic alliance.

## CFO Centre Canada + Meridian Financial
Brian Anderson previously worked at Meridian before joining CFO Centre Canada, maintaining strong ties between the two organizations.
